title: pisum quadratum
intro: Pisum quadratum, also known as the garden pea, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. Its medicinal properties include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and lower blood pressure. The health benefits of consuming Pisum quadratum include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving bone health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Pisum quadratum include tea, tincture, and capsules, which can be used to alleviate various health issues.
